revision_note: Revised per owner review rounds 1-3 (docs/review/comments.md): closed candidate universe; frozen eligibility status mapping; sec.10/sec.11/sec.7-B corrected; execution-boundary wording; CLARABEL corrected to ADMISSIBLE QP-form profile eliminated on the primary criterion (the prior 'inadmissible/invalid-dual' framing conflated it with the retired exact-conic experiment and is withdrawn); accurate per-row full-qualification feasibility; binding extended.
authorization_basis: docs/review/comments.md — Disposition A; conditional-coverage fallback rule; total eligibility decision table; review corrections rounds 1-3.
external_commit_binding: Correction 1, Option A: the Git commit and tree containing these final bytes are intentionally bound by the SUBSEQUENT EXTERNAL COUNTERSIGNATURE, not recursively inside this manifest (a file cannot contain the hash of the commit/tree that contains it). This manifest binds the final ARTIFACT BYTES (below). The final commit SHA and tree SHA are supplied from a clean committed state and verified by the countersigner before signature. The acyclic chain is: prior evidence -> final adjudication commit and tree -> external countersignature.

commit_provenance.final_adjudication_commit: supplied externally with the returned commit/tree/parent/timestamp; bound by the countersignature per external_commit_binding above.

superseded_authority.supersession_scope: forward-only, successor DESIGN only (see adjudication sec.2, sec.10); the prior authority is preserved unchanged and is not retroactively validated.

marginal_count_correction.note: 50/58 from the non-authoritative MR002_ComplementaryCoverage.json (owner ruling 2026-07-14 sec.5). Ranking robust; 5/51/59 used throughout.

excluded_before_ranking.HIGHS_QPASM: not algorithmically distinct from the active-set primary
excluded_before_ranking.QUADPROG_RAW: not algorithmically distinct from the active-set primary
excluded_before_ranking.QUADPROG_TSCALED: not algorithmically distinct from the active-set primary

clarabel_qp_profile.row_2765: numerical certificate nonqualification (kkt_residual+stationarity_residual) — NOT an integrity or dual-mapping defect

clarabel_exact_conic_experiment.reason: invalid dual transformation in the abandoned conic formulation (a DIFFERENT implementation from the QP-form profile). The conic-remediation manifest (MR002_QP_CandidateCapabilityManifest_ClarabelRemediation.json, sha 8c1d83ec...) is historical evidence about a Clarabel dependency/API field, NOT exclusion evidence against the admissible QP-form profile.

eligibility_status_mapping.registered_numerical_mapping: exact class ValueError + exact message 'constraints are inconsistent, no solution' -> QUADPROG_CONSTRAINTS_INCONSISTENT -> NUMERICAL_STATUS_NONQUALIFICATION -> invoke PIQP_P2 once
eligibility_status_mapping.future_row_semantics: fallback-eligible is NOT evidence of feasibility; feasibility established by fallback + common certifier; no substring matching; no eligibility by analogy

feasibility_of_the_5_FQ.predicate: complete registered KKT + two-sided signed-gap (requires a valid dual)
feasibility_of_the_5_FQ.statement: Each of the five QUADPROG_SQRT nonqualification instances is FULLY QUALIFIED (not merely primal-witnessed) under the complete registered predicate by multiple independent solver implementations, establishing that all five registered problems are feasible and the QUADPROG_SQRT outcomes are numerical false-infeasibilities.
feasibility_of_the_5_FQ.clarabel: one of the full qualifiers on 4 of the 5 rows; row-2765 is a numerical certificate nonqualification, not an integrity/dual defect. NO blanket claim that every named solver qualifies every row.

predicate.rules: exact as_integer_ratio inputs, outward-rounded >=100-digit intervals, NO max(Gamma,0), NO cushion, NO KKT-to-objective conversion

frozen_config.primary: QUADPROG_SQRT (active-set quadprog under z=diag(sqrt(t)) v; S^T H S = 2I exactly)
frozen_config.fallback: PIQP_P2 (proximal interior-point; mr002_piqp.py BASE settings; preconditioner_scale_cost=true; fresh solver per instance; no warm start)
frozen_config.cascade: QUADPROG_SQRT -> (eligible numerical nonqualification per the frozen status mapping) -> PIQP_P2 once; both-fail -> UNRESOLVED_NUMERICAL_FAILURE -> STOP; no third attempt / jitter / tolerance change / row-specific routing

quarantine_non_reuse.reuse: PROHIBITED for primary/fallback/eligibility/certificate/population/threshold; clean successor rerun regenerates all evidence anew.
quarantine_non_reuse.future_unresolved_set: unknown until executed; NOT asserted zero; the quarantined 3839/3839 is inadmissible.

authorization_boundary.execution: CLOSED — Stage-3 execution remains prohibited until a SEPARATE EXECUTION COUNTERSIGNATURE binds the finalized implementation, eligibility fixtures, source manifest, image digest, runtime configuration, and clean-run protocol (adjudication sec.10)
not_authorized: any Stage-3 execution before the separate execution countersignature
